created_at.description: CreatedAt is a helper struct field for gobuffalo.pop.

dispatches.description:
Dispatches store information about the attempts of delivering a message
May contain an error if any happened, or just the `success` state.

items.description:
MessageDispatch represents an attempt of sending a courier message
It contains the status of the attempt (failed or successful) and the error if any occured

created_at.description: CreatedAt is a helper struct field for gobuffalo.pop.

error.title: JSONRawMessage represents a json.RawMessage that works well with JSON, SQL, and Swagger.

id.description: The ID of this message dispatch

message_id.description: The ID of the message being dispatched

status.description:
The status of this dispatch
Either "failed" or "success"
failed CourierMessageDispatchStatusFailed
success CourierMessageDispatchStatusSuccess

schema.description: The standard Ory JSON API error format.

debug.description: Debug contains debug information. This is usually not available and has to be enabled.
debug.example: The database adapter was unable to find the element

error.example: The requested resource could not be found

error_description.description: Description contains further information on the nature of the error.
error_description.example: Object with ID 12345 does not exist

id.description:
ID is a unique error ID.
feature_not_available ErrFeatureNotAvailable
quota_exceeded ErrQuotaExceeded

status_code.description: Code represents the error status code (404, 403, 401, ...).
